items.title: London Hackney Carriage Act 1831
items.description: An Act to amend the Laws relating to Hackney Carriages, and to Waggons, Carts, and Drays, used in the Metropolis; and to place the Collection of the Duties on Hackney Carriages and on Hawkers and Pedlars in England under the Commissioners of Stamps.

items.title: Game Act 1831
items.description: An Act to amend the Laws in England relative to Game.

items.title: Vestries Act 1831(repealed 1.6.1992)
items.description: An Act for the better Regulation of Vestries, and for the Appointment of Auditors of Accounts, in certain Parishes of England and Wales.
